lint_backend.summary: 12 errors remaining (reduced from 36 in round 1): B008 (Depends in defaults, 6 instances in audits.py — standard FastAPI pattern), C901 (build_rule_findings complexity), UP038, F841, SIM105, N806, RUF046. All pre-existing from nova-act-core/live-stability milestones, not introduced by ui-demo features.

typecheck_backend.summary: 119 errors in 12 files. All pre-existing from nova-act-core/live-stability milestones: missing type parameters (dict, list) in browser.py/nova_act_browser.py, no-untyped-def in browser.py/audit_orchestrator.py, call-overload in taxonomy.py, unused type-ignore comments. Not introduced by ui-demo features.

lint_frontend.summary: 0 errors, 7 warnings (complexity in 4 components, max-lines in ReportPage, useMemo deps in RunPage). All warnings are pre-existing.

build_frontend.summary: Built successfully: 44 modules, 231KB JS (68KB gzip), 16KB CSS

nonBlockingIssues.description: SubmitPage uses 'cancellation_flow' instead of 'subscription_cancellation' from backend taxonomy. Pre-existing mismatch not fixed during ui-demo.
Utility functions (trimText, extractQuoted, prettyAction, prettyPath) duplicated between PersonaDiffPage.tsx and FindingCard.tsx instead of being extracted to a shared module.
Significant JSX duplication between Audit A and Audit B columns (~75 lines each). Should be refactored into a reusable AuditColumn sub-component.
Screenshot modal uses inline styles (~30 lines) instead of CSS classes in index.css, inconsistent with project convention of plain CSS.
Test fixes use getAllByText().length > 0 pattern which is weaker than scoped queries via within(). Verifies text existence but not correct placement.
Breadcrumbs and backLink props added to Layout component but no page actually passes these props. Dead code.
Dev artifacts (frontend/dev-server.log, PersonaDiffPage_screenshot.png) and node_modules files committed to repository.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add testing convention: 'When testing components that display scenario/persona names, use within() from @testing-library/react to scope queries to specific DOM sections, or use data-testid attributes, since these labels appear in multiple DOM locations. Prefer scoped queries over getAllByText().'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features fix-frontend-build-and-tests, persona-diff-page, and compare-page all hit duplicate text issues in tests. The fix commit uses getAllByText() extensively (10+ instances in PersonaDiffPage.test.tsx, 8+ in ComparePage.test.tsx) as a workaround.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify Pydantic models convention to: 'API routes return Pydantic models for JSON endpoints; file/binary endpoints (PDF, HTML reports) use Response/FileResponse.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pdf-export-api returns Response with binary content; existing get_report returns FileResponse. Current convention 'API routes return Pydantic models; never raw dicts' doesn't account for binary endpoints.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Never commit dev artifacts (log files, screenshots, temp files) or node_modules to the repository. Ensure .gitignore excludes: *.log, *.png in project root, node_modules/.' Also investigate why node_modules/ethical-site-inspector-frontend/ mirrors frontend source — this npm workspace symlink causes every frontend commit to duplicate files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: persona-diff-page committed dev-server.log and PersonaDiffPage_screenshot.png. Every ui-demo commit (history-page, persona-diff-page, compare-page, navigation-and-visual-polish) includes duplicate files under node_modules/ethical-site-inspector-frontend/.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add DRY convention for frontend: 'Extract reusable utility functions to src/lib/ modules. Do not copy-paste helpers between components. If a function is used in 2+ components, move it to a shared module (e.g., src/lib/evidence.ts, src/lib/format.ts).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: PersonaDiffPage.tsx copy-pasted 4 utility functions (trimText, extractQuoted, prettyAction, prettyPath) from FindingCard.tsx (lines 11-52 are identical to FindingCard lines 8-42).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Do not use inline style objects (style={{...}}) for layout, theming, or positioning. All styles must be CSS classes in src/styles/index.css.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ReportPage.tsx screenshot modal uses ~30 lines of inline style objects for overlay positioning, background colors, and layout properties instead of CSS classes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add taxonomy consistency convention: 'Frontend scenario names must exactly match backend taxonomy.py constants. Use a shared constants file or import mechanism to prevent drift. Currently SubmitPage uses cancellation_flow but taxonomy defines subscription_cancellation.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend/src/pages/SubmitPage.tsx uses 'cancellation_flow'; backend/app/core/taxonomy.py defines 'subscription_cancellation'. Multiple reviewers flagged this mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Frontend-dev skill should add fallback guidance for when dev server fails to start: 'If backend/frontend services cannot start (common in CI/resource-constrained environments), skip manual browser verification and document this in handoff as a skipped step. Focus on automated verification (tests, typecheck, lint, build).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: persona-diff-page worker spent 20+ tool calls trying to start services that never came up, reading non-existent log files repeatedly. Multiple workers skipped interactive checks entirely.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Frontend-dev skill should emphasize: 'Run ALL verification commands (npm test, npm run lint, npx tsc -b, npm run build) AFTER your final git add/staging. The committed code must pass all validators, not just your working directory.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: navigation-and-visual-polish handoff claims all checks pass, but committed code has broken JSX in RunPage.tsx. screenshot-timeline worker only ran component-specific test instead of full suite. Suggests verification timing issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: Handoff commitId mismatch in pdf-export-api (truncated hash in metadata)
rejectedObservations.reason: Not actionable — metadata tracking issue in the orchestration layer, not a code or convention problem.

rejectedObservations.observation: TDD skill deviation in pdf-export-api (worker found pre-implemented code from prior session)
rejectedObservations.reason: Reasonable deviation — TDD doesn't apply when code already exists from a retry. Worker correctly verified existing tests instead.

rejectedObservations.observation: Unused AuditListParams type in history-page types.ts
rejectedObservations.reason: Feature-level dead code, not a systemic pattern. Single occurrence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Layout mode hardcoded as 'live' in history-page
rejectedObservations.reason: Feature-level UX decision, not a convention gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mixed commit scope in fix-frontend-build-and-tests (backend ruff fixes alongside frontend test fixes)
rejectedObservations.reason: One-time occurrence during a fix feature. The backend changes were beneficial (reduced ruff errors from 36 to 12). Not worth a convention change.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill TDD not applicable for fix workflows (fix-frontend-build-and-tests)
rejectedObservations.reason: Expected deviation — fixing existing tests follows a different workflow than writing new features.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker transcript garbled output and excessive repeated tool calls in compare-page
rejectedObservations.reason: Infrastructure/tooling issue, not actionable via conventions or skills.
